identity.stage: Holding company / parent rolling up 3 acquired companies into one prime-ready platform.
identity.purpose: Georgetown Defense Analytics exists to reduce mission risk for those who defend our Nation.
identity.operating_identity: Agile Integrator — large enough to govern risk/compliance, small enough to execute at the speed of relevance.
identity.market_positioning: Boring Excellence — assurance over innovation theater. Predictable execution. Certainty of outcome.

phased_roadmap.deliverables: Org re-structure (3 OUs live), Brand launch (GDA), Doctrine rollout, CMMC L2 assessment scheduled, 4 net-new prime awards, single prioritized pipeline
Capture engine live, CMMC L2 audit passed, Major IDIQ awards, Win rates >45%, Program variance <10%, Real-time BI dashboard live
Enterprise AI Ops, 24% gross margin, Zero-defect compliance audit, Full CMMC L2, Margin optimization

positioning_paragraph: Georgetown Defense Analytics occupies the gap between Tier-1 primes and boutiques. Three operating units — Enable (Envision), Protect (Riverstone), Train (PD Systems) — deliver integrated mission support across defense, intelligence, and training. The $100M-to-$500M ramp is built on disciplined capture, zero-defect compliance, and the doctrine that 'the standard you walk past is the standard you accept.' Boring Excellence is the brand promise: predictable execution, certainty of outcome, assurance over innovation theater.
